rules_text: Generates 1 Infrastructure resource each turn. If destroyed, Blue Team loses 2 SCP.
flavor_text: Small utilities carry big responsibility.
learning_note: Water utilities often operate with limited staff and budget while supporting critical public services.

rules_text: If attacked by Malware or Remote Access, this Asset takes 1 additional damage.
flavor_text: The screen still works. The warranty does not.
learning_note: Unsupported HMI systems can increase operational risk when patches and vendor support are unavailable.

rules_text: When an Infrastructure Asset would be destroyed, reduce that damage by 2.
flavor_text: One alert. One phone call. One chance to stop it.
learning_note: Human operators are critical to detection, response, and operational continuity.

rules_text: Prevent all damage to one Pump, Valve, Chlorination, or Water Tower Asset this turn.
flavor_text: When automation fails, procedures matter.
learning_note: Manual operations can provide resilience when automated systems are unavailable or compromised.

rules_text: Red Team cannot damage more than one Asset with a single Attack.
flavor_text: A wall in the network can become a wall in the attacker's plan.
learning_note: Segmentation helps limit lateral movement and contain incidents.

rules_text: Return one destroyed Asset to play with 2 Defense.
flavor_text: Recovery is not magic. It is preparation.
learning_note: Tested backups help restore operations after ransomware, misconfiguration, or destructive events.

rules_text: Reveal one Blue Team Asset. If it is Infrastructure, draw 1 card.
flavor_text: The noise starts before the breach.
learning_note: Reconnaissance often begins with simple scanning to identify exposed services.

rules_text: If the target Asset is Legacy or Unsupported, deal 2 additional damage.
flavor_text: admin/admin still opens doors.
learning_note: Default credentials remain a common risk in legacy and poorly managed systems.

rules_text: If Blue Team has no MFA Protocol active, bypass one Defense card.
flavor_text: Convenience is a doorway when nobody locks it.
learning_note: Remote access should be protected with MFA, logging, and strict access control.

rules_text: Deal 3 damage to one unpatched Asset.
flavor_text: Copied code can still cause real damage.
learning_note: Public exploit code can be dangerous when exposed systems are not patched.

rules_text: All Blue Team Assets lose 1 Defense this turn. If Incident Commander is active, prevent this effect.
flavor_text: Public trust becomes part of the battlefield.
learning_note: Cyber incidents in water systems can create operational and public communication pressure.

rules_text: Scenario Objective: Red Team wins if Water Tower and Remote Access Pathway are both damaged before turn 6. Blue Team wins if Water Tower survives through turn 6.
flavor_text: The impact is not digital anymore.
learning_note: ICS/OT tabletop scenarios should connect cyber actions to operational consequences.

rules_text: Reveal all Blue Team Assets. The next attack against a revealed Asset deals 1 less damage.
flavor_text: You cannot defend what you forgot existed.
learning_note: Accurate asset inventory is a foundation for ICS/OT security and incident response.

rules_text: Remote Access and Credential attacks cost Red Team 1 additional resource.
flavor_text: One extra step can stop one easy breach.
learning_note: Multi-factor authentication reduces the impact of stolen or guessed credentials.

rules_text: Once per turn, reduce damage from a Remote Access or Vendor attack by 2.
flavor_text: Trust is useful. Review is safer.
learning_note: Third-party and vendor access should be reviewed, limited, and logged.

rules_text: Cancel 1 extra damage from attacks targeting Legacy or Unsupported Assets.
flavor_text: Maintenance time is defense time.
learning_note: Planned patch windows help reduce known exposure while respecting operational uptime.

rules_text: Cancel one Recon attack or reduce one Internet attack by 2 damage.
flavor_text: A small rule change can close a big path.
learning_note: Firewall review and rule hygiene reduce unnecessary external exposure.

rules_text: When Red Team plays a Recon card, draw 1 card. Limit once per turn.
flavor_text: Noise becomes useful when signals line up.
learning_note: Correlating alarms helps defenders turn scattered alerts into actionable response.

rules_text: Once per game, prevent one Infrastructure Asset from being destroyed.
flavor_text: The map is old. The operator knows the shortcut.
learning_note: Experienced staff often understand operational dependencies that tools miss.

rules_text: Restore 2 Defense to up to two Assets. Costs 1 less if Blue Team controls Community Water Utility.
flavor_text: No utility stands alone in a crisis.
learning_note: Mutual aid and regional support can improve resilience during incidents.

rules_text: Remove one Malware or Persistence effect from an Endpoint Asset.
flavor_text: Clean the foothold before it becomes the outage.
learning_note: Endpoint cleanup and validation are key parts of containment and recovery.

rules_text: Reveal one Internet or Infrastructure Asset. If it has cost 2 or less, Red Team draws 1 card.
flavor_text: The open web remembers what the utility forgot.
learning_note: Attackers often look for exposed services and internet-facing systems before attempting access.

rules_text: Deal 2 damage. If MFA Rollout is not active, disable one Operator until next turn.
flavor_text: One password tried everywhere is still one too many.
learning_note: Password spraying abuses weak authentication without needing advanced tooling.

rules_text: Disable one Operator for 1 turn unless Blue Team discards 1 card.
flavor_text: The inbox became the entry point.
learning_note: Social engineering can target operational staff and disrupt response timing.

rules_text: Deal 3 damage to an Application or Infrastructure Asset. If Asset Inventory is not active, draw 1 card.
flavor_text: A forgotten portal can become a front gate.
learning_note: Externally exposed engineering or admin portals create avoidable attack paths.

rules_text: Deal 3 damage to a Legacy or Unsupported Asset.
flavor_text: Skill optional. Exposure required.
learning_note: Known vulnerabilities remain dangerous when affected systems are exposed or unpatched.

rules_text: Deal 4 damage. Blue Team may draw 1 card after this attack resolves.
flavor_text: Loud attacks can still hurt.
learning_note: Low-sophistication malware may be detectable but can still disrupt operations.

rules_text: After damaging one Asset, deal 1 damage to another Asset unless Network Segmentation is active.
flavor_text: One open path became two.
learning_note: Flat networks can allow attackers to move from one system to another more easily.

rules_text: If Default Login Attempt was played this game, deal 2 extra damage.
flavor_text: Old passwords have long memories.
learning_note: Credential reuse increases the blast radius of one compromised account.

rules_text: Red Team draws 2 cards. Blue Team may draw 1 Defense card.
flavor_text: The attack was quiet until the attacker wanted credit.
learning_note: Public claims and noisy behavior can create defender intelligence opportunities.
